headline: Moody's Cuts New York City Outlook to Negative as Budget Gaps Grow
summary: Ratings firm keeps Aa2 debt rating but warns persistent deficits and rising expenses may pressure the city's financial flexibility.

raw.headline: Moody's Cuts New York City Outlook to Negative as Budget Gaps Grow
raw.summary: Ratings firm keeps Aa2 debt rating but warns persistent deficits and rising expenses may pressure the city's financial flexibility.

headline: As Iran war heightens affordability issues, don't expect the Fed to 'ride in and save the day,' analyst says
summary: Amid geopolitical turmoil, the Federal Reserve is widely expected to keep interest rates unchanged at its March meeting.

raw.headline: As Iran war heightens affordability issues, don't expect the Fed to 'ride in and save the day,' analyst says
raw.summary: Amid geopolitical turmoil, the Federal Reserve is widely expected to keep interest rates unchanged at its March meeting.
